lessonSubtitleText: Test how well you know this story

answers: An commander in the army of Syria
He was the king of Syria
He was a prophet like Elisha
He was the cupbearer to the king of Syria

questions.text: What did the servant girl tell Naaman?
answers: The prophet Elisha in Israel could heal him
He should stop eating junk food
He should pray and ask Baal to heal him

questions.text: When Naaman went to Elisha, what gifts did he bring with him?
Who spoke to Naaman at Elisha’s house, and what did he say?
answers: A messenger told Naaman to wash in the Jordan seven times
Elisha told him to go home
A priest told him to pray
He expected Elisha to wave his hand over him and heal him
He wanted to see what Elisha looked like
He didn’t trust the servant girl

questions.text: What happened after Naaman washed seven times in the river?
answers: His skin became clean like a child’s
Elisha came out and waved his hand over Naaman

questions.text: What did Naaman say after he was healed?
answers: The God of Israel is the only true God

questions.text: What did Naaman want to take home with him?
answers: Soil from Israel to worship God in his own land
Gold to give to his king
